oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Remote-workspace phase 2: forward the IPC socket + install shell integration remotely so a remote Claude pane gets live busy/idle, auto-title, and OSC-7 pwd tracking (deferred from PR #66).
Daily-drive the shipped app (now v1.5.1) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Released v1.5.1 — Session Overview redesigned as one unified card grid that fills the width regardless of workspace (was per-workspace stacked grids + section headers); workspace identity moved into a per-card, width-capped chip and the keyboard-selected card gets a blue glow. Ported from the 'Cards Grid' Claude Design; medium code-review pass applied (chip-vs-title layout, VoiceOver label, doc). PR #71. Built, notarized (Accepted), stapled; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live.

Released v1.5.0 — Cmd+N binds new-session + fixes Enter/Esc in the create-session popover (e7769b4), and the Session-Overview grid gains a confirm-delete popover plus vim hjkl navigation (13a2b85). Built, notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast (build 436) live.

Released v1.4.0 — bundles SSH-connected workspaces (PR #66), Session-Overview D/R (delete/rename) keyboard shortcuts (PR #67), and auto-naming worktree sessions from the live Claude title (PR #68). Built, notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live.
